name: Ibn Kathir
author: Hafiz Ibn Kathir
note: The most widely recognized traditional commentary in English.

name: Tafsir Al-Tabari
author: Imam Al-Tabari
note: The comprehensive 'Mother of Tafseers' for deep scholarly research.

name: Al-Jalalayn
author: Al-Mahalli & Al-Suyuti
note: Famous for its extreme brevity; perfect for quick mobile reading.

name: Tafsir Al-Qurtubi
author: Imam Al-Qurtubi
note: Detailed analysis with a focus on Fiqh (Islamic Law).

name: Al-Muyassar
author: King Fahd Complex
note: Modern, simplified Arabic explanation for everyday readers.

name: English translation - Rowwad Translation Center
author: Rowwad Translation Center
note: Valid QuranEnc English key (replaces invalid numeric id).

name: Tafsir Al-Saadi
author: Sheikh As-Sa'di
note: Gentle, modern, and spiritually focused commentary.

name: Maarif-ul-Quran
author: Mufti Shafi Usmani
note: Extremely popular for practical application to modern life.
